title: correlated subselect does not work
poc: create table prices (currency char(3) , valid_from char(8), price decimal(15,2));
create table vouchers (vid int, date char(8), cur char(3), val decimal(15,2));

select vid, date, cur, val, (select max(price) from prices p where p.valid_from = (select max(q.valid_from) from prices q where q.valid_from <= v.date and q.currency = v.cur )) as Preis from vouchers v;
key_bug_features: correlated subselect in price retrieval query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE prices (currency char(3), valid_from char(8), price decimal(15,2), PRIMARY KEY(currency, valid_from));
CREATE TABLE vouchers (vid int PRIMARY KEY, date char(8), cur char(3), val decimal(15,2), FOREIGN KEY(cur) REFERENCES prices(currency));

SELECT vid, date, cur, val, (SELECT max(price) FROM prices p WHERE p.valid_from = (SELECT max(q.valid_from) FROM prices q WHERE q.valid_from <= v.date AND q.currency = v.cur)) AS Preis FROM vouchers v;
